name: ServerPolicy
description: Security policy configuration for an MCP server.

requests_per_minute.description: Maximum number of requests allowed per minute.

requests_per_hour.description: Maximum number of requests allowed per hour.

requests_per_month.description: Maximum number of requests allowed per month.

ip_allowlist.description: List of IP addresses or CIDR ranges that are allowed to access this MCP server.

ip_denylist.description: List of IP addresses or CIDR ranges that are denied access to this MCP server.
